# AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore.Diagrams

## Purpose
In conjunction with D2, this package will generate entity relationship diagrams for an EntityFramework Core DbContext.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore.Diagrams/AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore.Diagrams.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0;net9.0;net8.0
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, Query, EntityFramework, D2, Diagrams
- Depends on: AllOverIt

- class CardinalityExtensions

- SetLabelStyle
